caption: 'I built 4 products before learning the boring SaaS lesson: demand comes first.' The most expensive lesson in startups, in one line. How many did it take you? Via Threadverse. #Threadverse #Startup
title: I Built 4 Products Before Learning This

caption: "Speak less, listen more." A founder's take on what journalists know that we don't. Surfaced by Threadverse from the noise. Does listening actually beat pitching? #Threadverse #Startup
title: Hey Founders: Shut Up.

caption: The StackAdapt founder hit 30 and wrote the lessons down. 'You still remember yourself when...' Rare kind of honest. What would your 30-year-old self tell you? Surfaced by Threadverse. #Threadverse #Startup
title: Today I Am 30. Here's What I Learned.

caption: 'After the initial Product Hunt spike, there's...' Every indie hacker knows this drop. He built a whole platform around the after. What did you do post-launch? Via Threadverse. #Threadverse #Startup
title: The Product Hunt Spike Fades. Then What?
